about.title: About me
about.bio:
I am a full-stack developer focused on building scalable web applications. I work across both frontend and backend, paying attention to architecture, performance and long-term maintainability. 

 My journey started with backend development in Python to understand core programming concepts. Later I moved to Golang and expanded my stack with TypeScript and React, allowing me to design and build complete applications from interface to infrastructure.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.desc: This is the «face» of the website. Everything you see, click, and interact with: from intuitive buttons to smooth animations and mobile-friendly layouts.

typescript.name: TypeScript
typescript.desc: Strong typing, generics, scalable frontend architecture.

vite.name: Vite
vite.desc: Fast dev environment and optimized builds.

backend.title: Backend
backend.desc: This is the «brain» and logic of the project. It handles data, user registration, and everything happening «under the hood» to ensure the site runs fast and securely.

tools.title: Tools
tools.desc: My professional toolkit. The technologies and software that help me write clean code, collaborate effectively, and turn ideas into finished products.
